findings.description: Section s3 contains only 'なし' (2 characters, well below 50-char threshold) and has no corresponding content in the source file. The source has 3 natural content blocks (intro, 基本構造, 標準ハンドラ構成と主要処理フロー) but the knowledge file defines 4 sections, with s3 being a content-less placeholder. The two RST transition markers ('+++++++') between source sections are not content sections and do not justify a separate knowledge section.
findings.source_evidence: Source structure: intro paragraph → ++++ horizontal rule → 基本構造 (h2) → ++++ horizontal rule → 標準ハンドラ構成と主要処理フロー (h2). No source content exists that maps to s3.
